headline: Rep. Ritchie Torres calls for probe into futures trades placed ahead of March pause on Iran hostilities
summary: Oil and energy futures trading before President Donald Trump announced a pause in Iran attacks in March raises insider trading concerns, Torres told regulators.

raw.headline: Rep. Ritchie Torres calls for probe into futures trades placed ahead of March pause on Iran hostilities

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Intercontinental Exchange, Raises Price Target to $198
summary: Barclays  analyst Benjamin Budish   maintains Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $193 to $198.
